case_title: ANTHONY E HELD P.E VS. ASSOCIATED LEISURE PRODUCTS INC.

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR RE: NOV-07-18 MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62470436) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELD P.E, ANTHONY E

DECLARATION OF LARALEI S. PARAS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62470436) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELD P.E, ANTHONY E
ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT, PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE 25249.7 (F)(4) AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6, JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE CONSENT JUDGMENT ATTACHED HERETO AS EXHIBIT A. BY STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD P.E.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT.GRANT. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH THE HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/SRB)

Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

GRANT. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health and Safety Code. Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)
